languages.original_text: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

languages.text: "Факт третий, заключительный. Мои изыскания направлены исключительно на благо Поиска знания и усиление Империума. Пусть моим штудиям и присуща определенная дерзость, я чту догмы и следую праведным алгоритмам Культа Механикус. За сим презентация моей позиции окончена".

"Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

"Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

languages.text: «Tercer y último dato. Mi investigación está dedicada en exclusiva al progreso de la búsqueda del conocimiento y el refuerzo del Imperium. Aunque es posible considerar mi trabajo como atrevido, respeto los dogmas y sigo los algoritmos benditos del Culto Mechanicus. Esto concluye la presentación sobre mi posición».
languages.original_text: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

traits.locale_text: «Tercer y último dato. Mi investigación está dedicada en exclusiva al progreso de la búsqueda del conocimiento y el refuerzo del Imperium. Aunque es posible considerar mi trabajo como atrevido, respeto los dogmas y sigo los algoritmos benditos del Culto Mechanicus. Esto concluye la presentación sobre mi posición».

languages.text: “事实三，也是最后一条。我的研究只服务于推进求知远征，以及增强帝国实力。尽管我的工作方式可能比较大胆，但我依然遵守教条，遵循机械修会的正统算法。我的立场说明完毕。”
languages.original_text: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

traits.locale_text: “事实三，也是最后一条。我的研究只服务于推进求知远征，以及增强帝国实力。尽管我的工作方式可能比较大胆，但我依然遵守教条，遵循机械修会的正统算法。我的立场说明完毕。”

languages.text: « Fait numéro trois, le dernier. Mes recherches ne visent qu'à faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance et à renforcer l'Imperium. Bien que mon travail implique parfois une certaine audace, je n'en respecte pas moins les dogmes et les justes algorithmes du Culte Mechanicus. Voilà qui conclut la présentation de ma position. »
languages.original_text: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

traits.locale_text: « Fait numéro trois, le dernier. Mes recherches ne visent qu'à faire progresser la Quête de la Connaissance et à renforcer l'Imperium. Bien que mon travail implique parfois une certaine audace, je n'en respecte pas moins les dogmes et les justes algorithmes du Culte Mechanicus. Voilà qui conclut la présentation de ma position. »

languages.text: "Drittens und letztens. Meine Forschung gilt allein der Suche nach Wissen und der Stärkung des Imperiums. Obwohl meiner Arbeit eine gewisse Kühnheit zugrunde liegt, beachte ich die Dogmen und folge den rechtschaffenen Algorithmen des Kult Mechanicus. Damit endet die Darstellung meiner Position."
languages.original_text: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

traits.locale_text: "Drittens und letztens. Meine Forschung gilt allein der Suche nach Wissen und der Stärkung des Imperiums. Obwohl meiner Arbeit eine gewisse Kühnheit zugrunde liegt, beachte ich die Dogmen und folge den rechtschaffenen Algorithmen des Kult Mechanicus. Damit endet die Darstellung meiner Position."

languages.text: "事実3、最後だ。私の研究は、知識の探求を進め、インペリウムを強化することだけに向けられている。私の仕事にはある種の大胆さが内在しているかもしれないが、私はカルト・メカニクスの教義を守り、正しいアルゴリズムに従っている。以上で私の立場についての説明を終わります。"
languages.original_text: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."

languages.text: "Üçüncü gerçek, sonuncusu. Araştırmam sadece İrfan Arayışı'nı ilerletmeye ve İmparatorluk'u güçlendirmeye yönelik. Çalışmalarıma belirli bir cesaret içkin olsa da dogmalara riayet ediyor ve Cult Mechanicus'un algoritmalarına uyuyorum. Duruşumla ilgili sunumum bu kadardır."
languages.original_text: "Fact three, the last. My research is directed solely toward advancing the Quest for Knowledge and strengthening the Imperium. Though a certain boldness may be inherent to my work, I do observe the dogmas and follow the righteous algorithms of the Cult Mechanicus. Here ends the presentation on my position."
